title: Azister's Weapons&Deco
description: Decorations and Itens that fit vanila style improving start tools and endgame.
body:
with Azister's Weapons&Deco Mod you will have: 120 more decorative blocks, some epic weapons with diferent efectts.

The Player can have more decorative block following a similar style to vanila minecraft to use, and also some diferent options for weapons with new cool effects.

  includes in 0.2.5:
decoration for flat worlds with no ores
